sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Naupangte in tatkhiatna tangkote hithei dinga,
Nipi sumpi tawh Lai Siangtho a puakkhia ding uha,
Tua in tuipi gal a mite lungdamsak

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Naupangte in Honpa itna thupha tangko nuam a sa mahmah uh hi;
in, mite van inn tun na’ng lungdam takin lamlak ding uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungkham, dahnate zong nuamna suaksak ding uh hi;
Khuavak bang mi gitna kam khum tawh hopih ding

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Naupangte kiphawk hi, Topa’ hong kamciamna sungah,
Topa’n a maute limtak kemin lungmuangsak dinga,
